family_summary: This overwrite deliberately narrows the bundle to the strongest direct-violence anchor now available: the 16 March 2022 strike on the Mariupol Drama Theatre. Broader citywide mortality remains too entangled with siege deprivation, displacement, unregistered burials, and indirect mortality to support a clean public DR anchor.
notes: Direct violent deaths only. Deportation, starvation, dehydration, medical-collapse, and other indirect siege mortality are intentionally excluded from the baseline path.
